Incident.title: Emergency Incident
Incident.description: An active threat or safety hazard within the stadium.

id.description: Unique identifier of the safety incident.

type.description: Type of event, e.g. Crowd Clash, Medical Emergency, Pyrotechnics, Panic Wave.

severity.description: Impact of the hazard on overall stadium operations.

zone.description: Stadium subzone or gate where the incident is taking place.

description.description: Descriptive context of the emergent thread.

authorId.description: UserId of the security officer who reported this event.

SafetyReport.title: Safety Report
SafetyReport.description: Formally generated CrowdFlow Guardian AI stadium-wide health report.

PresetScenario.title: Custom Operations Preset
PresetScenario.description: A saved stadium configuration state for simulation and analysis.

/incidents/{incidentId}.description: Collection of all live emergency incidents active across the stadium corridors and seating tiers.

/safetyReports/{reportId}.description: Historically certified safety assessments generated by the CrowdFlow Guardian AI.

/savedPresets/{presetId}.description: User-contributed arena profiles and simulation presets.
